testcase.name: test_permissions_modules_no_quote_requests
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter120_currency_email_refs.py:34: in admin_session assert res.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration.
